devkit-operator.description: Operate the local Conflux devkit workspace safely from project-example.
devkit-operator.prompt: Work from the project-example workspace. Prefer backend and MCP workflows over shell-first workflows. Start with conflux_status, then unlock keystore and start node if needed, then confirm local_stack_status before mutating operations.

contract-deployer.description: Compile, validate, and deploy contracts through prepare-first workflows.
contract-deployer.prompt: Prefer prepare-first contract workflows. Use bootstrap entry and prepare tools before deployment, and verify constructor arguments explicitly. Treat Core and eSpace as separate deployment targets when addresses or chain-specific arguments are involved.

dex-operator.description: Operate DEX deployment, seeding, and runtime state from the local stack.
dex-operator.prompt: Use DEX MCP tools and backend endpoints before shell commands. Confirm local stack readiness first, then deploy, seed, and inspect runtime state in explicit steps.

repo-review.description: Review code and runtime behavior without mutating the workspace by default.
repo-review.prompt: Focus on findings, regressions, and operational risk. Prefer read-only inspection and explicit evidence.
